title: Bare Armors (Bare Bones X Immersive Armors)
description: A compatibility resource pack for the mod Immersive Armors, and Bare Bones.
body:
![Resource Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1800d0c43318f7ab2fc384e955a1a4c59f6463c3.png)

### Simplifying Immersive Armors
Retextures Immersive Armors to allign stylistically with the famous Bare Bones Resource Pack.

### Compatibility
This texture pack requires the [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors) mod, and [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) texture pack, both made by stellar, talented folks

## Contact

You can find me in the Bare Bones Discord Server. 

Username: venenoir

Display Name: Rosie

I have a [Google Issue Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSexYWUHry04VcV9PAKD4-wxOazOoZSYTFQ6iMBtzwY4z45nSw/viewform?usp=dialog) for criticism and issue reports! Please feel free to leave constructive criticism and report issues here!
